PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Thomas Lucas (Executor).

The Court noted that no one was here to object. The Court granted the Ex Parte Petition to Vacate the prior Order for Probate dated December 24, 2012 and the related Letters Testamentary (order for the same signed in open court). The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was also granted (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
